headline: Congress returns Monday with judicial confirmation votes in the Senate and a packed Energy and Commerce markup in the House!

senate.lastSessionSummary: The Senate was not in session on Saturday, July 18. The chamber stands adjourned and will reconvene Monday afternoon to resume consideration of Benjamin M. Flowers' nomination to be United States Circuit Judge for the Sixth Circuit.

onTheFloor.title: Nomination of Benjamin M. Flowers of Ohio to be United States Circuit Judge for the Sixth Circuit
onTheFloor.status: Cloture vote scheduled for 5:30 PM Monday

house.lastSessionSummary: The House met briefly on Saturday, July 18 for just two minutes. Two reports were filed: H.R. 1703 on Medicare payment rules for manual wheelchairs and H. Con. Res. 113 establishing the fiscal year 2027 congressional budget. No votes were held.

onTheFloor.title: Protecting Families from AI Data Center Energy Costs Act
National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2027

committees.topic: Closed business meeting on intelligence matters
Markup on 25 bills including AI data center costs, grid modernization, drug trafficking prevention, and Medicare transparency
Hearing on Stop Insider Trading Act, Main Street Capital Access Act, FY2027 budget, continuing appropriations, defense authorization, and disabled worker employment
Markup on Intelligence Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2027
